nodes.label:
Closure under +
Commutativity
Associativity
Additive Identity
Additive Inverse

Closure under ·
Distributive (2x)
Compatibility
Multiplicative Identity

svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350" viewBox="0 0 420 350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Vector Spaces and Subspaces
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Main Vector Space -->
  <rect x="80" y="60" width="260" height="120" fill="#2196F3" fill-opacity="0.2" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Vector Space V
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Subspaces -->
  <rect x="100" y="100" width="100" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" fill-opacity="0.3" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="150" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#0D47A1" opacity="0">
    Subspace U
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="220" y="100" width="100" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" fill-opacity="0.3" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="270" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#0D47A1" opacity="0">
    Subspace W
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Vectors -->
  <line x1="150" y1="130" x2="180" y2="150" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="165" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#E91E63" opacity="0">
    v
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <line x1="270" y1="130" x2="240" y2="150" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="255" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#E91E63" opacity="0">
    w
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Intersection -->
  <rect x="185" y="110" width="50" height="40" fill="#FF5722" fill-opacity="0.3" stroke="#FF5722" stroke-width="2" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#BF360C" opacity="0">
    U∩W
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Basis vectors -->
  <line x1="120" y1="160" x2="140" y2="170" stroke="#9C27B0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="125" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#9C27B0" opacity="0">
    b₁
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <line x1="120" y1="160" x2="130" y2="145" stroke="#9C27B0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="115" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#9C27B0" opacity="0">
    b₂
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Dimension labels -->
  <text x="50" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-style="italic" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    dim(V) = n
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="50" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-style="italic" fill="#0D47A1" opacity="0">
    dim(U) = k ≤ n
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Properties list -->
  <text x="210" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Properties of Vector Spaces:
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="210" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Closure under addition and scalar multiplication
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="210" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Contains zero vector
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="210" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Follows vector space axioms
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Zero vector -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="280" r="3" fill="#F44336" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="220" cy="280" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#F44336" opacity="0">
    0
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
